<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update bank account"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/payment-methods/bank-accounts/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



    Update an existing bank account payment method in the Account.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment-method:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
